title: Krafton releases BGMI 4.3 update with Ancient Secret Rise mode: Details

title: Baalbek, the Lebanese city from the era of Alexander the Great under bombardment – protothema at the ancient temples
description: In the past, Baalbek was called Heliopolis; in 1984 it was declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site – In yesterday’s bombings, three members of a family were killed, including a 3-year-old child The post Baalbek, the Lebanese city from the era of Alexander the Great under bombardment – protothema at the ancient temples appeared first on ProtoThema English .

title: Ajanta’s ancient murals decoded in a new children’s book
description: Discover Ajanta’s ancient Buddhist murals and hidden stories in Ashwin Prabhu’s engaging children’s book, Magnificent Murals.

title: NASA's Perseverance pays off, finds ancient river delta buried 115 feet under Mars
description: Perseverance rover uncovers ancient river delta on Mars, revealing early water and potential for life

title: An ancient food preservation method for today
description: Confit and rillettes are two traditional methods of food preservation. Dating back to ancient civilizations, these methods originated as a preservation practice before the advent of refrigeration. They both involve slowly cooking meat in its own rendered fat. By submerging the food under a layer of fat, an anaerobic environment was created, effectively preventing spoilage [...] The post An ancient food preservation method for today appeared first on Illinois Times, the capital city's weekly source of news, politics, arts, entertainment, culture .
